chunks.title: Accession and Early Reign
chunks.reason: Introduces Amaziah's reign, character assessment, and execution of his father's killers according to Mosaic law.

chunks.title: Military Mobilization and Divine Warning
chunks.reason: Describes the census, hiring of Israelite troops, the prophet's warning to dismiss them, and their angry departure.

chunks.title: Victory over Edom and Idolatry
chunks.reason: Details the military success against Seir/Edom and the subsequent introduction of their gods into Judah.

chunks.title: Prophetic Rebuke
chunks.reason: Records the confrontation between the prophet and Amaziah regarding his worship of foreign gods.

chunks.title: Challenge to Israel and Rejection
chunks.reason: Contains the exchange between Amaziah and Joash of Israel, including the parable of the thorn bush.

chunks.title: Defeat at Beth-shemesh and Plunder
chunks.reason: Narrates the battle where Judah is defeated, Amaziah captured, and Jerusalem plundered.

chunks.title: Later Years and Death
chunks.reason: Summarizes the remaining years of Amaziah's life, his conspiracy in Jerusalem, and his burial.
